body_transformation: The rounded head's mushroom cap transforms into a cracked, molten crimson dome with glowing amber fissures, while the pink body adopts a burnt orange hue with charcoal-black magma cracks. White spots become ember-scaled patches on the head, and the curled tail tip develops a flickering molten gold flame. Dark blue accents shift to smoldering charcoal with heat-haze distortion, maintaining the compact silhouette. Short stubby legs gain subtle ember-scaled textures at the joints.
signature_feature: Mushroom cap: molten crimson dome with glowing amber fissures and ember-scaled texture.
